semantic_description: Kadane-style array scan over a nonempty int array. The function initializes cur and best from a[0], then uses a for loop from i = 1 to n - 1 to update cur as max(a[i], cur + a[i]) and best as max(best, cur). It returns max_subarray_sum_spec(l) and preserves the input array memory unchanged. The contract requires n >= 1, Zlength(l) == n, full ownership of the input IntArray, and an overflow guard for every nonempty subarray sum.
